source.title: How do I Mine Resources in Starbased?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How do I Mine Resources in Starbased?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Mining in Starbased is essential for collecting resources that fuel your fleet, crafting, and Starbase upgrades.
Preparing Your Fleet
Undock your fleet in a sector with a Starbase where mining is possible.
In empty sectors, you can only scan for SDUs mining is not available there.
Starting Mining
Select Your Fleet & SectorNavigate to the sector where your fleet is located and select the fleet you wish to mine with.
Initiate MiningClick “Start Mining” from the fleet menu.You’ll see:
Available resources in the sector
Mining rates per resource
Estimated time to fill your cargo
Review the details, then click “Initiate Mining” and approve the transaction in your wallet.
Stopping Mining
When your cargo is full or you wish to relocate:
Click “Harvest Resources and Stop Mining.”
Approve the transaction in your wallet.
Your mined resources are now in your fleet’s cargo.
Unloading Resources
Dock your fleet at a Starbase to unload your mined resources into your Local Inventory, ready for crafting or trade.
